name: CHSP - 1
body:
Hi %contact_first_name%,

I set you up with your own custom home search…it updates in real time with the latest listings that match what you’re looking for.

%custom_ylopo_listing_alert%

You can favorite homes you like, hide ones you don’t, and message me straight from your portal if you have any questions!

Excited to help you find the right place!

Best,
subject: Your personalized home search portal is ready!

automations.name: New Lead - Custom Home Search Portal
